rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, N.A. AS TRUSTEE, ON BEHALF OF THE VS. RONALD TRATHEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Continue Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 26, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, N.A.'s Motion To Continue Trial Date. Grant, subject to opposition, continuance of trial from April 2, 2012 to May 7, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSE WING PROPERTIES VS. DAVID BEAUMONT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Provide Responses To Written Discovery And For An Order Establihsing Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memo P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 26, 2012, line 9. PLAINTIFF ROSE WING PROPERTIES' Motion To Compel Defendants To Provide Responses To Written Discovery And For An Order Establihsing Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Grant request for production, request for admissions to written interrogatories and sanctions totaling $1090, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR KAPLAN VS. TARAS TITARENKO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 26, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT TARAS TITARENKO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar untimely, not proper 16 day notice and improper notice, i.e., Judgment on Pleadings basis for demurrer. = (501/REQ)
